title: Bridge Essay: Content Representation of Tactile Mental Imagery in Primary Somatosensory Cortex

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Imaginal bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Content Representation of Tactile Mental Imagery in Primary Somatosensory Cortex.** — eNeuro (2023). PMID: 37221090. DOI: 10.1523/ENEURO.0408-22.2023. Score: 53. The imagination of tactile stimulation has been shown to activate primary somatosensory cortex (S1) with asomatotopic specificity akin to that seen during the perception of tactile stimuli. Using fMRI and multivariate pattern analysis, we investigate whether this recruitment of sensory regions also reflects content-specific activation (i.e., whether the activation in S1 is specific to the mental content participants imagined).
